reviews.review_text: wow what a beautiful place for a C/van pk although for us 80 yr olds it's a great way to test your fitness
Great park, very kid friendly and plenty of Amenities options

Super pretty.|They have a coffee vending machine. |So much hills.|Game room everything cost money (coins only, apart from ping pong.) |Super cool playground i love climbing|I hate these hills.|Big space in camp kitchen to play cards.|Very cool pond. |The golf course is fun. |So many animals, Ducks, Rabbits, Dogs.
Nice park, lots of cabins, sites are good with flat area so no need to level, staff are friendly and helpful, amenities are ok but showers not well designed so hard to keep everything dry

Ein sehr schöner Caravan Park ca. 1km vor Hahndorf. Der Park liegt in den Adelaide Hills, in kurzer Entfernung gibt es mehrere Weingüter. Das älteste deutsche Dorfin Australien ist natürlich hpffnungslos touristisch überladen, aber auch wieder witzig. Nur die deutsche Bäckerei gibt es dort nicht (mehr). Dafür muss man nach Mt. Barker fahren, dort gibt es die Lobethal Bakery. Tolles Schwarzbrot, Laugengebäck etc. Als wir dort waren gab es ein MG Treffen, der Park war voller Oldtimer dieser Marke.

The pet friendly cabin is perfect, there is a little area out the back with a dog bed. We are so stoked we booked this cabin. Worth every cent. My daughter loved the mini golf and moon bounce, the whole place is absolutely beautiful. 10/10 would definitely stay again

Great location, short walk into Hahndorf and a local supermarket is directly opposite. Would be nice (and safer) to have a walkway down to the main road. Some sites are better than others. Try to avoid sites 19-28 as the distance behind your van is nothing. Pretty much packed in like sardines and no privacy whatsoever. Had a walk around the park and other sites seem so much bigger. Not very level either. In a Motorhome and used ramps and was still well down at the front. Loaned a ramp to a neighbouring rental van
too. Didn’t use the amenities but looked into the Camp Kitchen which seemed very well kitted out. Laundry was reasonably priced at $5 a wash. Probably a little unprofessional of the ground staff speeding around the place in the golf carts with music blaring. They should be setting the example of others to follow.
Beautiful location, wonderfully located, awesome staff. Staying here was a great experience. Thank you to the wonderful team at Discovery Parks - Hahndorf 🙏👍😀
Camped here over xmas 2025. Great place, facilities were clean. Easy walking access to Hahndorf.  Great location.
Good facilities. Lovely surroundings. There needs to be information in the cabins on how to access wifi.

We stayed here for 2 nights 20-22nd april 2026 and as you entered the grounds, you knew you are at a great place. Staff were very welcoming on arrival, the grounds are well looked after, we had a superior 1 br cottage lakeview, very spacious and comfortable too.  Plenty for the children and big kids too. Located across the road from hahndorf market and only a short drive into the town of hahndorf.  I honestly cannot fault this place, well done discovery park- hahndorf. I recommend staying here on your travels in SA.
Perfect place to stay for a few days if visiting Hahndorf, especially with kids.

We were  a large group of 27 people, with children ranging from 2 to 18. This park catered for everybody, with its location being central to exploring the sdelaide Hills, hahndorf and surrounding towns.
We were there over Easter, and even though it is a large park it was very quiet at night.  The activities provided for the children was fantasic, and the park itself had so much to offer. Our cabins were excellent, and the caravaners were also pleased with their sites. Even though this park is a little bit expensive, it was worth every dollar. Happy children, happy adults!
Super location! Beautiful park and facilities!

BEST CARAVAN PARK I'VE EVER VISITED!
All sites are powered
All sites are cleaned of leaves and debris, lawns are mowed and kept clean
Communal kitchen is spotless clean & modern with multiple cooking areas you can use, they have fridges you can put your food in, tables and chairs inside & outside around the BBQ area. These facilities provided are very very clean  & kept in immaculate conditions
Showers & toilet blocks, extremely clean & modern 😃
The premises are always cleaned.
The lawns are mowed, and all debris swept away
There is a swimming pool also
Easy check-in. Rooms as described. Good parking

We are LOVED our stay at Hahndorf Discovery Park. We camped in our tent with our family and loved seeing the red leaves on the trees in Autumn. The service was amazing and made us feel very welcome. The pool was 25 degrees which felt pretty good for early April. The camp kitchen was the best we've seen on our adventures and the place is so clean and beautifully kept.
5 stars!
Thank you Hahndorf Discovery Park for a fun Easter.
Good place to stopover. Cabin was clean. I had all amenities I needed in the room.
Good place to stay. Close to lots of things. Hahndorf is such a beautiful place.

This is such a beautiful caravan park, the facilities, the grounds and the staff were all so wonderful! Everything was super clean and it’s a lovely walk to town! And food market is right across the road, perfect for stocking up!

Discovery park Hahndorf is one of the best parks we have stayed at in our travels. Amenities and grounds are immaculate.
Very friendly staff. Magic sites and put put golf a must do. The games room is also excellent.
Great location and room, walking distance to town and plenty of options.
The caravan sites could be leveled better
The sites are lovely and the park is immaculately maintained.  Although the park was full it was still quiet!
Super nah zum Dorf gelegen, gute sehr saubere Anlage, freundliches Personal, Pool,…Farmerladen gleich unterhalb
Great Park to stay at all year round
Had a great stay at this Caravan park, facilities were all really clean. Location is really good, basically on the main street just further down.
Excellent layout and facilities friendly staff, nice  restaurant in there too. Very happy to recommend. 5 years on ive come back and still back.my original review.  Excellent place
Highly regard the park. Nice sites, good scenery and facilities. Staff were very friendly.
Lovely room and surrounds

Best caravan park I have come across in Australia.  Sites are level but roads in hilly so can make it challenging to manoeuvre larger caravan so go for drive through if you can.  Amenities spotless, camp kitchen is brilliant.  Reception staff extremely professional and friendly, went out of their way to assist.  Definitely recommend this location to others.

Sehr gut besuchter Campground.
Die sanitären Anlagen und die Campkitchen entsprechen dem Standard und sind gepflegt gewesen. Es gibt sogar einen Snack- und Getränkeautomat.
Auf dem Platz befindet sich eine kleine Schar freilaufend Enten und Kaninchen. Da muss man beim Fahren aufpassen.

We had a lovely stay at this park. The park itself is beautiful and very well maintained. The view from the pet friendly cabin was so unexpected. Beautiful big trees and it really felt like a hills getaway. The rabbits were frequent visitors both at the front and back of the cabin which was an added bonus! The only constructive feedback I would give is that it would be handy to have an oven especially if you were staying longer and a freezer. We were also unable to stream anything on the tv which we were able to do at other discovery parks. The farmers market was brilliant and so close right across the road they had everything we needed. We will definitely be back!

Overall, the park was great and the kids really enjoyed it, although a bit more shade over the pool would have been appreciated.|Our main issue related to the bistro. At check-in and in the program, we were advised that the bistro would be open during our stay. However, on our second night, when we planned to eat at the park, we found it closed.|After calling the after-hours number, we were told the bistro was not open and would not be opening on any of the nights. With two hungry children and both parents having had a few drinks, this left us in a difficult position. The delivery option suggested to us was one the children had tried the previous night and did not enjoy and no other delivery available, left me with no choice but to drive into town to buy food.|This situation could have been easily avoided with a simple text message, particularly as text messages were sent during our stay for other notices.|I had hoped to leave a higher review and emailed this feedback twice (once via the website and once directly to the park). Unfortunately, receiving no response has only highlighted the need for better communication.

Great caravan park kept very clean and a nice walk in to Hahndorf it’s just a shame people that bring there dogs don’t pick up the shit stepped in two was not happy at all especially when you walk it in your caravan this isn’t the parks fault but maybe they should think about banning them as people don’t like doing the right thing and wrecking it for everyone else.

Overall, the park was great and the kids really enjoyed it, although a bit more shade over the pool would have been appreciated.

Our main issue related to the bistro. At check-in and in the program, we were advised that the bistro would be open during our stay. However, on our second night, when we planned to eat at the park, we found it closed.

After calling the after-hours number, we were told the bistro was not open and would not be opening on any of the nights. With two hungry children and both parents having had a few drinks, this left us in a difficult position. The delivery option suggested to us was one the children had tried the previous night and did not enjoy and no other delivery available, left me with no choice but to drive into town to buy food.

This situation could have been easily avoided with a simple text message, particularly as text messages were sent during our stay for other notices.

I had hoped to leave a higher review and emailed this feedback twice (once via the website and once directly to the park). Unfortunately, receiving no response has only highlighted the need for better communication.

Loved this beautiful Germany village, great food,  great location
We stayed in our caravan
The best caravan park we've stayed in on our lap so far. Very clean amenities, stunning views over the hills and walking distance to the town and pubs. Would stay again.

Really enjoyed my stay. Very helpful staff, clean, well laid out. Very sensitive and considerate park, shade vegetation,  good lighting,  clean.
One of the best. I hope I can visit again one day.
Very well managed, clean and enjoyable
We stayed in our van. A great view of the Adelaide Hills, lots of gardens and greenery. Walking distance to Hahndorf. A great place to stay. We'll be back!

We stayed in the Lake House recently for a few nights. The house was clean and very comfortable. The Disvocery Park had great amenities and was a good walk away from Hahndorf township. We had a lovely time there overall.
Special thanks to the staff at the Discovery park, who discovered some clothes left in the wardrobe and mailed these back to us. Very much appreciated!

Despite the heatwave, we enjoyed our stay!! Everything we needed was there!

I just wish they had a gym too. ☺️
An unreal experience, beautiful caravan park. The location in the adelaide hills is second to none. Close to all the small country towns.

This is a great park to stay at with a family!
Great facilities including the toilets, shower and laundry. Powered sites with ease of access to water, power and drainage for grey water use.

We stayed in a powered site right near the playground, ramp circuit and mini golf, kids loved it! The Games room is also well equipped when it was too hot of a day.

We will definitely be coming back to stay!
New, good views. Good for holiday stay and relax.

Highly recommend this park. Perfect setting, amenities great and the staff are beyond helpful!! Went out of their way to accommodate us for an extra night and moved things around so we didn’t have to move sites.

Great park at a good location. We enjoyed the festivities of Hahndorf and the Hahndorf Market which is walking distance from the caravanpark. Wineries, Farm Barn, strawberry and cherry picking nearby. Quiet park and well maintained. Free mini golf, swimming pool scooter park, etc.
Absolutely the best part we have stayed in really well kept grounds, clean tidy and fantastic views, ambience and outlook. Mini golf big chess, I'm plenty of things to do
Great place to stay and visit lots see and do
Cabin was immaculate, but you cab hear *everything* from the adjacent cabin!
Amazing, clean but slightly pricy for a discovery park. But likely to return.
Clean and comfortable room. Great facilities and location was peaceful. Easy 30 min drive into Adelaide CBD.
Great place to relax several days

Very disappointing. Whilst the room was nice and clean, we were very excited for the child friendly facilities, the pool, mini golf, playground etc. It is badly designed for the warmer days. The pool is not child friendly by any means  Paid for 2 nights which is not cheap! After spending the first afternoon/night not able to use the facilities. Spent this morning elsewhere and made the decision to check out 1 day early.

This place is wonderful. Very well maintained, friendly staff. Cabin was immaculate, had great views of the lake from verandah, which was undercover. Had everything that was needed. There was milk in the fridge, tea, coffee and sugar plus fresh roasted ground coffee. Very comfortable beds, extra bedding and towels and towels for use in the swimming pool, also good quality toiletries supplied. The cabin was airconditioned but also had a portable heater/cooler in the bedrooms plus electric blankets. Good quality kitchen appliances and equipment. The swimming pool was lovely and had a shade over it, crazy golf was well maintained and there was a large chess board. I can't think of anything bad to say about Discovery Park Hahndorf.
Great caravan park.
Great stay, thanks
Perfect, lush green location amenities excellent. Campervan

Recently stayed in a powered site. The park is very well maintained and all amenities and the camp kitchen kept spotless and in good condition. The caravan sites are spacious and the use of hedges and plants around each site provides privacy. There were a lot of extra features to keep both adults and kids entertained. The staff were friendly and helpful. The christmas decorations spread throughout the park added to the festive atmosphere. This was the most well maintained and clean park we have stayed in.

What a rip! Seriously. There's price gouging, and there's this place.

In the future, if you ever work for the council and you're researching as to why there are so many people free camping, don't go around and try and penalize the free campers. Penalize places like this that are absolutely price gouging people out of the ability to just stay in paid accommodation.

Seriously, the council needs to provide some actual alternatives for people so they can afford to stay in the area rather than be bent over a barrel by places like this with exorbitant prices.

I guess this is what happens when mega corporations buy out the small caravan parks and then chase the dollar like nothing else.

UPDATE:

Oh my goodness, now it makes even more sense since the reply.  They're using "Dynamic Pricing".  Just like evil mega corps like Uber are doing.  Charge obscene pricing if they can get away with it due to demand.  Forget everyday families.  Leave them in the dirt.

It's as bad as it gets.  Corporations need to be reigned in.  We need some controls put in place over this industry, as it spirals out of control, owned by mega corps, doing all they can, for profit at all costs.

Cooked.
Great place to stay. Just around corner from the main Hahndorf shops, eateries etc
Great park and location. Toilets are too far away from campsites (in my opinion) but the amenities are fabulous.

Group of 5 caravans on powered sites. Fantastic facilities including huge camp kitchen, laundry and level sites. One of the best van parks I've been to. Also has large conference centre and motel accommodation. Terrific staff and lovely grounds.
Very good
Lovely place to stay absolutly beautiful park

We had the best time staying in the cabins! The staff were so lovely and helpful. We had absolutely everything we needed and the small grocery store was just a short walk away. It’s also a very convenient location being so close to town. The only thing is, is that we wish we stayed for longer!
Good location to visit the German town

We travel extensively, and this is easily the cleanest cabin we have ever had the pleasure of visiting.  Arguably, our accommodation was better than many hotel rooms we've been in as well.  Obviously recently refurbished, the decor was fresh, modern, clean and tasteful.  Strong block out curtains greatly appreciated for a good night sleep alongside the comfy bed, pillows and crisp  linens. Lots to do for the younger travellers.  Quiet location.  Easy parking.  This place is really impressive.  Would stay again and recommend 10/10.

We stayed at Discovery Parks Hahndorf and were really impressed with how well-kept the entire park is. The gardens are lovely, with plenty of trees throughout. We were in a cabin, but the caravan sites also looked great—each with their own garden space and a tree on every site. Once those trees grow a little more, they’ll provide great shade in summer and let the light through in winter, which will make the park even nicer.

Our cabin was very comfortable and had everything we needed. It had a lovely outlook over the lake, and we really enjoyed being greeted by the morning sun on the big deck. The only small negative was the lack of a walkway down the side to reach our car, which meant we had to walk past our neighbours’ front area each time.

The kids’ facilities were fantastic—our kids absolutely loved the bouncing pillow, playground, bike track and mini golf. It really added to the stay and kept them happily entertained.

Overall, a really nice park and a very enjoyable stay.
Very popular an park full or near full.  500m to Farmers Market and Hahndorf Town.  Friendly staff and clean & tidy facilities.   Will definitely come back.
Clean, great location, perfect getaway spot

Excellent accommodation, very spacious and clean.
There was a miss communication with the rooms but Alice at reception was very helpful and accommodating to fix this issue for not further cost.
Thank you very much, highly recommend to anyone staying in the area.
Beatiful place and so peacefull

Spacious cabins, beautifully clean. Probably the best Discovery Park we have stayed. Abundant bbq’s and well-cared for camp kitchen. Great play facilities for kids of all ages. Well equipped fruit veg and essentials market across the road, and 3 minutes drive to Hahndorf Main Street. Gorgeous treat was to see multiple friendly rabbits nibbling grasses around the park and right next to our balcony 🥰

Lovely clean place with a nice feel. Its about 30-40 minite drive out of adelaide proper.  You will need a car if you stay there.
Units are well kept and clean.

Wonderful park. Greak for families. But as others have said, they have a function center that takes priority over paying guests. Even though the park has a quiet time specified from 22:00, the function is allowed to hammer us with their music till 23:30. So we lie awake. I want to come back, but I don't think I will.

We are in the middle of our extended stay at Hahndorf and I must say WOW we have been on the road now for close to 3 years and this is one of if not the best parks we have stayed in. We are on a powered site which is tiered and private although the neighbours aren’t too far away. The park is beautiful, very well maintained, excellent facilities, the amenities are very spacious, spotlessly clean with heaps of hot water. The camp kitchen is excellent and the staff are constantly getting around the park cleaning and maintaining the above. The grounds are beautiful and also being constantly looked after. It’s a great park and we will be back 👍👍👍
As far as a caravan park goes, this place is top notch! Great amentieties, decent drive thru site size, beautiful atmosphere. Hahndorf town is amazing
Beautiful location and rooms

What a wonderful park we stayed here 3 nights in a drive through powered sites.
Could not falt this park everything is kept pristine great little gardens around your sites and maintained beautifully amenities spotless great location. We have been travelling a while and stayed at other discovery parks big 4 ect and this has been by far the best highly recommend

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Highly RecommendDiscovery Parks – Hahndorf is a fantastic place to stay! It’s an easy walk to all that Hahndorf has to offer, with a fabulous market conveniently located just across the road. The amenities and cabins were excellent — clean, modern, and very comfortable. The staff were friendly and incredibly helpful, even going out of their way to retrieve items we accidentally left behind in our room. A truly relaxing and well-run park — highly recommended for anyone visiting the Adelaide Hills.
Omg this place is just an absolute oasis, its so breathtaking 😍

Highly recommended.

Facilities, location and staff all great.

Would consider as an alternative to staying in Adelaide.

Wonderful!
Great place. Had interstate visitors stay here.
We had a fabulous great stay ! Lady at the reception was extremely friendly and helpful.  Great location with in walking distance from everywhere

Fabulous 5 night stay 14-19 Oct. We are a couple travelling in their van. Loved this park for the location, fabulous landscaped grounds, gorg pool, putt putt golf (The challenge was on with my partner! We played twice!), lovely staff in reception and around the grounds and the bike track. Well done all ! Thanks for a great stay
Beautiful caravan park and would love to return.
Great park with great facilities!
Highly recommended 👌

Stayed here 4 weeks in Sep/Oct and loved it. Bit pricey but worth it as everything is top notch here.
2 Ammenities blocks, both modern and clean.
Professional and friendly staff.
Very handy short walk to Hahndorf where car parking is impossible when busy. Also right opposite is the famous Hahndorf fruit barn that has the best fruit you can get anywhere. Also they make much  of their food right on site and have a great continental section ( my favourite is their sensational Mettwurst).
Highly recommend
Great place for families. The rooms, kitchen are clean and all furnuters are like new. It is pleasure to stay there.

Great sites that are well sized and clean. Park facilities well maintained - saw staff cleaning BBQs and facilities every day. Hot showers that are also clean. Great camp kitchen ideal for groups and families. Awesome activities for kids. Only downsides were the need to walk up the fairly steep hill to amenities and the small shower divider that makes keeping clothes dry a challenge. Would still recommend staying.

Great quality service. Needed a room change to a larger room and they accommodated quickly with no issues, was very pleased with our family stay. Beautiful to watch the bunnies playing around outside the rooms each morning.

The Cabins were excellent quality a great stay for a weekend for us. Lovely location and immaculate grounds with birds, ducks and rabbits about. The staff were very friendly and helpful would stay again.
Stayed in a brand new cabin it was awesome  I will stay there next visit to harndorf
Excellent place to stay for a vacation to Adelaide. Short drive to the city but get to stay in a wonderful German town.

A great place to stay if visiting Hahndorf. Located in the edge of the town, with wonderful cabins. Very modern and the ones around the lake are amazing. Mini golf, large chess and a small bike track are a bonus for the kids, along with a pool and jumping castle. Highly recommend.
Nice modern cabins. Short walk Into town. Heaps of activities, mini golf, pump track and a pool. Ducks and bunnies hopping round too.

Great location for Adelaide & Hills.  There during the severe weather event at end Aug 25.  Jeremy (Ass Mgr) and park staff were terrific at keeping us safe, comfortable and informed.  Heart felt thanks to all involved. Geoff A
Awesome spot have an exploration tomorrow 😀

A Special stay is hahndorf. The park is on the hilly side. But don't let it  stop  you from staying. The staff are absolutely  awesome. Always there to help and  always smiling. As if nothing is a bother. Don't forget the fruit and vege across the road
It’s our go to caravan park when we are traveling through the area, super clean, great facilities, dog friendly, what more could you ask for 👍👍

We have been caravanning for 9 years and this is the best caravan park we have ever been in. Great park very clean and well maintained great staff and we had to be evacuated due to severe weather to a safer spot on site and they were amazing - fed us, and kept the kids entertained and although it was a long day it was made much more comfortable by the staff - great job guys - can highly recommend and ammenities and activities second to none! Also bus stop right at the park takes you into Adelaide or up town.
Spent three days here in a caravan, great clean modern amenities. Good size sites and landscaping. As well as great location for Hahndorf Village. Bonus the grocery store across is amazing.

The rooms are well equipped, the grounds are very well maintained. Lots for kids to do and very clean around the park. We had a two bedroom chalet and it was very large, everything you would need for a short stay. We are a shoes off household (crawling baby) and the floors were absolutely disgusting, all socks (white) worn have been thrown out so keep your shoes on and clean your babies!

Location is good just outside the town and an easy drive from the airport. So many ducks and rabbits around which my toddler loved. I did not love the rooster (I think) at 5am or my neighbour leaving and talking outside the room at 6, bring white noise or ear plugs.

We have stayed here 3  times now and it just  gets better. Had a drive through  sites for our little vintage van. The whole site is amazing, staff so friendly  and accommodating. The Camp kitchen is just Theee best we have ever been two. We decided with it being winter we would utilise it. Great  heater the best equipment ever. We will be back
One of our favorite accomodation venues placed perfectly to go to Hahndorf
Lovely park, one of the best.
Helped us sort out an error in our booking due to our error with no fuss. So grateful.
Awesome spot definitely go back there

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️||Our camping experience at Hahndorf Discovery Park has been absolutely outstanding! The amenities, staff, and overall presentation are all top notch. We originally booked for 4 nights but ended up extending our stay because we loved it so much.||The park has been the perfect base for our day trips to Adelaide, Victor Harbor, the Barossa, and of course, exploring the beautiful town of Hahndorf itself.||We’re now heading to the Yorke Peninsula, but I have a feeling this stay at Discovery Parks will be hard to beat. I 100% recommend staying here!

Great caravan park. Other than the room, wasn’t great for the money we paid. There wasn’t any heating in the lounge room only the bedrooms, which would over heat and never went into the lounge room, which we all were.
The shower was shocking design, every time you turned it on, it would go all over you and burn you.
The fridge was tiny bar fridge. Ive been to other caravan parks and it a was a full size fridge, especially when you have a lot of food for kids! Overall not great for kids, the games room, all the machines didn’t work, we wasted money and the kids were upset nothing worked not even Netflix would turn on for them! The Mini Golf was all flooded and there wasn’t anything else there for them other then
the jumping pillow.

My partner, our son and myself just stayed for the weekend and fell in love with the park. We were given a free upgrade to a 2 bedroom unit and it was wonderful. The room was clean and cosy. The heaters were even turned on for our arrival which was very welcomed as it was a chilly evening. There was plenty of coffee/tea/hot chocolate/sugar. We had a little wander around the park and thought the camp kitchen was the best one we’ve ever seen! Loved the ponds and the ducks and rabbits wandering around. We will definitely be back!

Stayed on a powered drive through site.  Sites are long and wide with a concrete annex pad.  Roads are all sealed and wide enough for large vans to easily navigate, that makes getting onto your site very easy.  All the power, water and sullage points are well positioned and staff check and maintain sites as soon as they are vacated.  Excellent swimming pool and the best camp kitchen with commercial grade ovens and BBQ grills.  Staff are lovely, toilet blocks and all facilities are modern and immaculate and it is all an easy walk into Handorff along a sealed pathway.
Such a great park so clean and well kept including mowed lawns. Plenty of things to keep kids amused and the fire pit is great.
Great facilities and close to an absolute cracking fruit market

Great room, has heating for winter and air con for summer, which is great. It's quite a large park, clean and lots to do for the kids, and big kids.
The only thing I would be picky about is there needs to be more than 1 chair in the room we were in as well as a bedside table. But everything else was great. Very handy location with beautiful Hahndorf close by.

For a single exception!!!

The staff are rude!!!

Booked for 3 days and then extended for another 4 nights and did not remove old towels or replace toilet paper.

Zero communication.
We are traveling and pay for your wages!!;

Without us traveling and our support !!

Get a job in a factory as customer support is not in your forte
Absolutely fantastic park with 1st class amenities. Staff are very friendly and helpful too!

Never been a caravan park girl and was a little tentative however went with a group of friends for a weekend away and loved it. The cabins we exceptionally clean and spacious and had all the modern facilities you needed at an affordable price.
The park overall was well maintained and we loved the mini golf and chess.
Easy walk to main street and would certainly stay there again.
Really nice holiday park, perfect for visiting Hahndorf and surrounding area.
What a fantastic place! well organised.  great accommodation. will be booking here again!
Stayed one night as a family and our accommodation was perfect (family room with two double beds.)  Nice decent walk into town for dinner (can recommend the German Inn for dinner.)
Amenities very clean, all sorts of activities and to do here. Bus service right out front of the park that takes you to the centre of Adelaide in under an hour. Very convenient
An excellent caravan park with outstanding facilities.
Beautiful park tidy and clean.

Great location, outstanding park, very clean and honestly couldn't fault. My wife and I stayed in the 2 bed lake view cabin and we couldn't be happier. The park itself couldn't be better located for our needs. We stayed 5 days, 4 nights and was easily able to do everything we wanted. We spent a day in The Barossa, a day in the Fleurieu peninsula, a day in Adelaide Hills and was still able to shoot into Adelaide city for a few hours. I couldn't recommend the park or Hahndorf itself more highly. Side note, if your a red wine drinker, ensure you have a lot of money sitting on your credit card, you'll definitely be going home with a few boxes of wine.
Booked drive thru spot, got a camping spot with no space. Couldn't even stay the night.
Great clean park

Incredible clean. Well looked after and tidy park.
Staff were slightly disorganised and didn't read notes but they resolved quickly on arrival. Great spot
We stayed in a cabin fantastic  park with attention  to detail

First time staying at this park. Absolutely loved it we stayed in a summit room which is like motel style and it was immaculate. The heater was on when we arrived. The bed was so comfortable. Best bed I’ve slept in.
Can’t wait to return
Very steep entry and exit to your caravan site. The park and facilities are extremely clean and well maintained.  Easy walk into town, great location.
Very nice place. With all the amenities. A covered kitchen with all the accessories. Clean bathrooms. But above all, the most beautiful thing about this place is the view of the hill. I would return.
Very happy with this place extremely cozy and well kept probably better options around for a summer trip with kids but for adults it’s really nice

Great spot to base yourself.

Room had everything you need and was very comfortable.
Great check in staff who allowed early entry for our caravan.  Park well maintained and very convenient to many of Hahndorf’s attractions.   Yes it is hilly and you may need caravan levelling blocks.
Had the best stay. Service was amazing. It's such a beautiful park, very well looked after and only a 15-minute walk to the main street
Fantastic location and services. Beautiful grounds and sites, services and equipment are really nice and well maintained. Staff are friendly and helpful. Wonderful views. Top quality place.
Walking distance to Hahndorf with it's good German Good, great Go. & Whiskey tasting.
We use the caravan park side we were right on the road side and had a great view of the hills

Probably one of the best caravan parks I’ve ever been to. We stayed in a Lakeview cabin. Cabin was clean and very comfortable. The aircon/heater was going when we arrived so our cabin was a pleasant temperature. Loved looking at the pond with all the ducks and we had a couple of rabbits playing outside our back deck. Walking distance to Hahndorf which was very handy. Would definitely recommend.

Great caravan park. Large open spaces and lots of activities for the kids. Close to Hahndorf's main road. Heated pool, mini golf ⛳️ electric bike hire, movie night's.
The only issue is that the powered grass sites don't seem to get time to recover between guest's. A minor set back for such a beautiful place to stay.

Stayed on May 2nd as my wedding was the next day at The Adelaide hills convention centre. I was so happy with my stay. It was relaxing, which is what I needed the day before my big day. I loved the special surprise of the bunnies at night. My partner and I will be making it our go-to for every wedding anniversary. Thanks team

Clean cosy and comfortable , awesome view of lake  birds chirping ducks in the lake was beautiful to see  electric blankets on the beds which was a nice surprise overall a beautiful stay , will be back 😁
A beautiful place and dog friendly! Great facilities!

We stayed 4 nights in a powered site. The admin staff were really good, going the extra mile to extend our stay. Such good service!
The whole park is so neat and clean. There are so many maintenance crews keeping everything pristine. The management team should be congratulated on a job well done.
I definitely recommend staying at this park.

The park deserves 5 stars, however they lost 2 stars for the negative experience and unfriendly check in. We arrived early 10.45 am and have been told to go away and come back 11.30 am. 15 minutes later a couple from WA arrived and they could check in. After that I walked back into the office and was advised she tried to ring me 3 times and my phone rang out. I checked and had no missed calls at all. I was very disappointed as I had an extremely friendly person when I booked over the phone the powered caravan site for 5 nights. We travelled all states of Australia with our caravan and this was the most negative welcome at a caravan park.

This caravan park is absolutely stunning. The level of cleanliness and facilities is off the charts. The presentation of the park is second to none. The cabins looked beautiful. The area was very dry at the time we visited, but the park still managed to present beautifully. The only downside was the reception on arrival would have been warmer if provided by a dead fish. The woman who 'greeted' us had no personality, no welcoming smile or words. This is not a great first impression. Maybe a refresher in hospitality may be needed or a generous glass of wine???
Great and beautiful location
Great park, quiet, good facilities.

Friendly staff and amazing atmosphere.
Mini golf and pool.
Close to shops and fruit market.
Tours etc
Great location, very clean, quiet park.
Excellent family stay.

Nice park but very hilly Good amenities and lots to do for kids
Will definitely come back
Lovely location, beautiful park, mattress was a little harder than I like, but husband said he was comfortable.

Very impressed with the size of the rooms and spa. Very nice hydrotherapy spa in the room. We came for Easter and the park program said Easter Bunny would be at the pool area at 1030 Sunday morning, our 2.5 yr old daughter was very disappointed when no Easter Bunny arrived and when queried with reception was told they had already been at 1015!

Lovely well kept park.
Had everything you needed within walking distance.
We stayed 6 nights and only had 2 towels, we ran out of coffee and tea bags.
I thought that may be they would have serviced the rooms for a top-up.
Had trouble getting someone to answer the phone. Could not book online for 1 night only, so had to do it by phone. Did not return my message. A case of just keep trying.
Camped on a powered site with our van. Clean facilities,  friendly staff, spacious sites, close to main shopping street in Hahndorf.
Amazing double queen room, easy to check in, close access to Hahndorf.
This Park is a cracker. Close enough to the beach and Adelaide City. Beautiful Town. A must visit is the German Arms Hotel.

We had a drive through caravan site (No. 3) which was great. Roomy with great outlook. All sites kept neat and clean and amenities really good. Also some nice open areas for walking the dog and dams with ducks and plenty of activities.

Modern and clean cabins with all the required amenities. The pool was great, though for those with kids, note that the minimum depth is 1.3m.
There's mini golf, a beautiful pond and plenty of ducks and rabbits to watch.
Staff are very friendly and helpful.
My only wish was that there was detergent available for purchase in the bottom laundry room rather than at reception. The hike up that hill and back with a baby in tow was a bit brutal!
Very pretty spot with neat and clean amenities, generous camp kitchen, outdoor BBQs and gaming room

Walking distance to town, markets across the road. We stayed in a standard 1 bedroom cottage which sleeps 5, had lake view with ducks, it was great, very clean, staff lovely, park kept tidy. Has mini golf course and games room. Only thing was internet kept dropping out. This park is the best we have stayed in so far, we will be back.
Amazing place to stay. Loved it and we will be back again
Fabulous amenities,  clean park, friendly staff, close to main street in town.

Perfect location for a visit to Hahndorf. We were situated on the side of the hill halfway between either of the amenities blocks and camp kitchen. Lots of dust blowing in due to, I believe, are dought conditions, but there were sites with green grass, and all the cabins had grass surrounding them. Our site allowed people in the terraced site above us to see straight into our caravan so our blinds were often closed. Office staff are not knowledgeable regarding local attractions and referred me to the books in the corner. Overall not a bad park but certainly not exceptional as we had been led to believe from a word of mouth referral.

We stayed in a powered site. The attention to detail with this park is truly evident. Probably one of the best we have stayed in around Australia. Amenities are very clean and modern. The park is well kept, watered and great facilities for kids as well. The trees are magnificent. Well done Discovery
Hahndorf, keep doing what you’re doing 👍

Wir waren leider nur auf der Durchreise und nur eine Nacht auf dem Campingplatz. |Die Sanitäranlagen sind sehr sauber und modern,  die Anlage ist gepflegt und toll angelegt. Einen kleinen Minuspunkt gibt es, deshalb auch nur die 4 Sterne: unser Platz war relativ uneben. Es war etwas schwierig das auszugleichen. Aber Auf jeden Fall kann man den Platz zu 100 %  weiterempfehlen.

Great caravan site. Plenty to do at the park and close to Hahndorf and a short drive into Adelaide. Crews cleaning the park did not go unoticed. Van sites cleaned and ready for new travellers every day. Will  be telling all my fellow travellers how good this place is. Oh and I got a hole in 1 at the mini golf. Won't say anything about the 6th.(ha ha).
Thanks to everyone at Discovery Parks Hahndorf.

We've stayed in several caravan parks previously, but this is by far the best. We stayed at a powered site for 2 nights with a couple of other families. Everything is well maintained and clean. The kitchen area was very clean and spacious, with plenty of laundry space. The toilets and showers were spotless.

There is plenty of space, and a good play area and a gaming room to keep kids happy. The pool was also well maintained. Shout out to the friendly and helpful staff who made our stay even more enjoyable.

It's only a couple of minutes' drive to Hahndorf. There is a fruit and veg market right opposite the main road. It has a good bakery with some good options.

Overall, we had a fantastic time and would highly recommend to anyone looking for a great family-friendly caravan park.
Great holiday park! Excellent location, really well kept, good green sites! Wish I could have stayed longer here!

Travelling from Perth to East-coast with RTT and the more east we get the nicer the campgrounds! Definitely our favourite spot so far! Because there is some kind of holiday here we could only book in 1 night, otherwise would book 3 nights minimum.

Nice private spots, amazing surroundings, cool German style town next to us, a lot of nature sound, big new clean kitchen and amenities! Very nice and quiet place to sleep! Most of people enjoying the peace and quiet only few caravans blast the music for everyone.

In the region great value for money!

Great stay and wonderful lakeview. Quiet, calm and easy to access.
Good rates and easy service. Highly recommend.
Our cabin was out of the way to the facilities.  There was repairing needed to window sill
Had a wonderful stay in your beautiful and well kept park. Amenities and facilities were well maintained. Our powered site was level and easy to access. Thank you for a lovely stay.

We have stayed at the caravan park for 3 nights. The location is great and, the park is very clean and the swimming pool is great. But that’s where it ends. The sites are too close together. The staff are not the friendliest I’ve come across and I went for a little walk and because I went up a road where permanent cabins are some woman came out to tell me that that road was private why did she pay for the road for God sake? I was only walking stretching my legs which I injured at the park anyway don’t think I’ll bother going back lots of other great places.
Perfect cabin for a sneaky getaway. Could not fault the accommodation. Pool was pretty good, lots of things to do within the park. No disappointment for us 😊

We were a "walk-in" and the room we found in our search on Booking.com was still available. We managed to get the Superior Room Cabin (1 Queen). We were pleasantly surprised by the generous size of the cabin, which had a private bathroom and full kitchen. The cabin was also very clean. The staff at reception were professional and friendly - (We dealt with Carolyn). We enjoyed a quiet environment, although there were caravans and children around. Hahndorf food market is just across the road. The bus to Adelaide is on the same side as Discovery Parks (at the entrance). The town of Hahndorf is amazing, with many cafes and a variety of shops, etc. (My only disappointment was that I couldn't find Haigh's Chocolate Shop in Main Street! 😒 We went to Melba's Chocolate factory instead. My husband and I thoroughly enjoyed staying at Discovery Parks and would stay here again, if we come this way again.

Booked into one of the units, booking in was easy, the units are tucked away in a nice grassed area out the back , the units are very modern ,they have all the modcons you would require , bit out of town, so buy everything before you arrive , I think the units are overpriced.

Currently travelling full time and this has got to be one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at.

The games room is a kids dream!

The amenities, camp kitchen and games room are incredibly clean.

Garden and surrounds are well kept and all staff that we have encountered have been very friendly.

Definitely recommend a drive through site if you have a caravan as the regular sites seem quite small. We have a 26ft van and Chevy and have ample space on the drive through site.

This is one of the nicest caravan parks I've ever encountered. We stayed in a cabin, which was generously sized and with a nice outlook. Our kitchen facilities were minimal, but there's a camp kitchen that's fully equipped, including ovens. Our friend stayed in different cabins with more appointed kitchens, so check the listing to get what you need. The usual jumping pillow and pool kept the kids very happy. The mini golf is challenging and fun. There's a very good quality coin laundry and an expansive clothesline for drying  clothes. This was an easy and delightful place to stay and I will definitely be back!
Had a an amazing experience. The service is delightful and the rooms were really clean and perfect.
Great park, pet friendly. Good pool, pump track, chess, parkland, playground. Across the road from the fruit and veg markets. Nice spot
Amazing holiday park. Very clean, quiet and close to the Main Street.

Very nice park. On a hillside, so don't expect flat terrain, but this does offer some nice views. Well planned park and all sites appear to be level. The outstanding aspect of this park is its cleanliness. I even observed every vacated caravan site carefully inspected and cleaned daily.
Beautiful place! Quiet and relaxing! Very helpful and accommodating staff! Thankyou

We love this park, one of the best we have stayed in. Beautiful setting.  Staff friendly and helpful. Only one complaint....THERE ARE NO RECYCLE BINS!!!  When I asked the gardener he said people put general rubbish in them. How would you know if you don't have any? Please put some in!
Great caravan park just a short walk from Hahndorf town centre.  Highly recommend.

Probably the best Discovery park we've been to. The staff and grounds maintenance personnel are extremely helpful and polite. The park is set upon a hilly range, very well maintained and ran, the views are excellent from all sites. This is a campsite to be put on your to do list. The fact that it is surrounded by wineries also helps!!
Absolutely immaculate. Cannot rate the cleanliness high enough. Quiet. Very well appointed. Would definitely stay here again.
Beautiful Caravan park,stayed in 2 bedroom spa cabin,very clean and nice,had everything I needed,will definitely be back to stay again in the future.
Beautiful place to stay wonderful rooms. Has plenty to do for the kids.
Great park. Lots to do but not enough time to do it. Hilly park but sites well set up to be almost flat
Excellent Park. Rated very highly for cleanliness in the grounds, sparking in the amenities & clean as camp kitchen. Customer Service Staff were very welcoming.
First visit of many to come. Perfect location and atmosphere. Staff are friendly. Plenty for all to do.

Beautiful park clean and amazing facilities.
Just a bit of a drive to the main shops.
Very well run caravan park with excellent staff. A large variety of sites, all with plenty of room. Good swimming pool, amenities and large camp kitchen highly recommend
One of the best park in australia

Amazing park with immaculate facilities.
Best maintained park that I’ve stayed in across Australia. We will be back
What  a great place  pet friendly and quiet with exceptional accommodation.
Stayed in a spacious cabin with a kitchen. Very clean with a comfortable bed.
A beautiful park that caters for all travellers
Can't go wrong if staying here. Prices are high but you get what you pay for

Excellent location nestled in the Adelaide Hills, a wonderful charming village with selection of local goods and markets. A beautifully maintained caravan park with manicured gardens and trees, and a lovely pool. Highly rate this park!

This is one of the best maintained CPs I have ever stayed in. Very neat & tidy in all aspects. The only dump point with soap & a sink I have ever seen. The staff are all amazing friendly, cheerful & great service
Bit too hilly for older folk.
Really good environment and so relax if you wanna see some ducks and rabbits around the hotel, you should come over here

This place is beautiful! Well looked after and in a fab location!
Pool nice and heated, activities room, laundry and mini golf
Only down side is the laundromat had most it's machines out of order when we were there and the water pressure for the showers was depressing compared to the showers in the chalets you can stay in
Despite this, we plan on coming back here! One of the top 2 parks we stayed in on our trip
Lovely little place. Great views of the dams with their own duck and fish population. Great conference centre, with lovely food and staff that look after all your dietary requirements
Beautiful caravan park.All sites are a good size. All amenities are at the top of the hill. A good walk into town

Amazing park, 4 night stay, powered site, 2 adults, pre booked. This is one of the most beautiful parks we have stayed in, the location certainly helps, Hahndorf and the Adelaide Hills, but it is also very well looked after by a great team of groundskeepers.
Coming from the highway, there is no dedicated turning lane and the road is quite busy so care is needed. The park is set into the hills with terraced sites and easy access to reverse into. We were on 15, half way up a hill and each site had gardens/trees to offer privacy between.
The amenities were  spacious, clean and modern and included a separate family bathroom. The camp kitchen was terrific with an undercover outdoor seating area overlooking the valley and hills. Further down was a kids delight games room.
Every team member we met was engaging and happy to share a chat, often giving us more insight into the park and nearby areas.
We have no hesitation in recommending a stay here, there’s something for everyone.
We stayed in our campervan. Used the camp kitchen.  So impressed with everything.  Facilities, gardens are all very well maintained.  Just book early!
A great park nice and tidy plenty of space for van and car

Came here for work conference the service was impeccable. The rooms were well maintained. The staff were very professional and accommodating. I had also a very pleasant experience with Judy and Andy who went over and beyond several times for myself and my time when they were called upon. Highly recommend!

Fantastic place to stay
Great campers kitchen and facilities

Sites  are  well maintained.  Toilets, camp kitchen spotless. Games room and pool heaps of fun.
The views at sunset amazing.
Staff so friendly.

Cannot fault this place, stayed a few times...everything was so clean and the staff were friendly...if I had to pick something I would say the queen size bed was a little on the hard side...other than that I cannot fault the discovery park
A well maintained, picturesque park. It’s great to see the addition of more playground equipment and young children’s play area in the games room. Our young grandson was well occupied.

Stayed a few nights,..great park. Facilities modern & clean. Well maintained.  Some sites a little tight when trying to park vehicle alongside, but got there in the end.
Close to the town & everything else for that matter. Staff excellent.
Would certainly stay again
Great camping resort good ammenities, close to Main Street of Hahndorf

An amazing park,  ground and amenities are spotless and well kept,

Camp kitchen is amazing best set up and everything you could want.

We had a drive thru site which made getting in so easy especially considering the hills.

Didn’t get to try mini golf but looked fun,
Also loved the addition of a pet blanket/bed washing machine very handily while travelling

Will definitely stay again

My only issue is the main living area of the cottage did not have heating or air-conditioning not sure how that would pan out in extreme temperatures.
But new, clean and affordable if you're staying in Hanhdorf

Very well presented park ,amenities in good condition,  staff very accommodating.  The location is very good for Hahndorf shopping district . Easy access to the express way to Adelaide,  25 minutes drive to the centre of town .
Pretty nice accommodation for staying here! I love Discovery Parks, save my trips in Australia.
Amazing facilities and sites, will definitely visit again!
Very well kept park and had a few park events on such as BBQ and Pancakes 🥞 for charity while we were there. Great location close to town.

Not cheap but nice location and park is well appointed.

BE WARNED: There is a function centre onsite and the night we stayed in a powered caravan site, there was a very loud function. The site rules say no load noise after 10pm but the site manager seems to think that doesn't apply to the onsite conference centre! He just told us to take it up with management tomorrow, and i thought he was the night watchman?

When you have many weary travellers who need a good nights sleep its not good have load booming dance music playing late at night.

I think Discovery Parks Hahndorf needs to rethink which customers it is servicing?

Do not stay here if you need a good nights rest before driving your family the next morning on busy SA roads!
Staff very helpful ,.room  was  extremely clean.
Great place to stay.

Beautifully presented and maintained grounds! Our powered caravan site was perfect with awesome views. We had an issue with the water tap that was fixed immediately when we reported it. We originally booked 3 nights, and were easily able to have an extra night even though the place looked full up. Amenities are meticulously clean and there is alot to entertain kids and families.  If I had to make a suggestion it would only be  to add more washing machines and driers for the busy periods, but that is really nothing to complain about!
I am even writing this review mid stay, we are very impressed with our whole experience!
Nice modern caravan park in a nice town.
Lovely clean & scenic park for our caravan! Highly recommend.

This place is modern, clean, lots of facilities.  Toilets/showers immaculate.  Just on walking distance from town.  However the caravan park is on a hill with teraced carvan spots.  Depending on where you are allocated you will need to either reverse down hill or up hill both presenting issues.  There are a few drive thru sites but get booked out quickly.  New child playground getting installed.  Quality roads and gutters throughout but sites aee bit on the small side.  Still recommend though.

I attended a conference held here. Beautiful views. I did not stay on site so I cannot comment on the accommodation. But if the catering and function facilities are anything to go by the rooms must be top class.
Very nice and close to town. Not sure how's the summer here though, winter was perfect!
Excellent service and very helpful staff

Best facilities of a caravan park i have seen, amazingly clean and well run.

Location is great, a walkable distance to the main street and wonderful rolling green views.

Park itself is well layed out, only issue is with its hills the kids found it a little hard to ride bikes (not the parks fault).

Facilities are top notch, massive well equip camp kitchen (with heating), separate games rooms, clean and modern bathrooms, really solid attention to detail (benches in the kitchen had cushion toppers and high chairs were available).
Best park we stay at on our three week roadtrip, clean and tidy. Only thing can fault was truck noise on the highway which is out of their control
Clean and well maintained park

What a lovely park! Awesome camp kitchen; enclosed with heating. Good size sites, enough for our camper & kids swag on one site. Very clean, updated amenities including laundry. 2 ladies at front counter were beyond friendly when I had to change dates by a day. Our 2 night stay was perfect, we will be back.
Beautiful view. Clean and tidy modern facilities. Easy to find.  Very helpful friendly staff.
So relaxing and very clean!
Wow. Our 1st time here and I'm blown.  Sites are good size. Amenities are very very clean. The camp kitchen is amazing!

Great place to stay. Facilities are phenomenal. Staff are very kind, considerate and accommodating. Even better, it was pet friendly and our 2 mini dachshunds had a great time sniffing and exploring. Thank you to a great team!
Amazing caravan park. Everything is set out beautifully.
Top notch caravan park, within walking distance of town
Nice stroll into Hahndorf. Great facilities at the Discovery Park. Staff very helpful.
Well maintained park , very good amenities and friendly staff, easy sites to reverse into eg no domestics 👍
Immaculate condition.

This is by far one of the best parks around. The staff are super friendly and helpful. The grounds immaculate, and there is a community fire pit, bloody brilliant. It is super close walking distance to Hahndorf town.
Great park, excellent location, but some sites are small or awkward. Just talk to the office if too difficult and they were happy to help.

Lovely place, close to shops and fruit market.
Highly recommend
beautiful sites, clean amenities, they even have a washing machine designated for washing dog bedding.
Great park, one of the best parks we have stayed in. The facilities are great and clean. Lots of hills within the park, make sure you have your walking shoes if you want to get around.
The cabin was great.    Nice and quiet. Loved it!

A truly beautiful area to visit. Park is very pretty, well maintained and staff are very lovely. Sites are a bit tight but amenities are excellent. A great base to explore the area. Absolutely stunning in late summer early autumn.
Lovely campground with fantastic clean facilities.

The best park we have ever stayed in.
Been on the rd 10 yrs fulltime and this park is amazing.
Cleaning staff do a 10/10 for the amenities block , grounds people literally  keep this park looking 1,000% and staff and management are friendly  and can't help you enough if you need it.
We will be back in September/October  for another 2wks to sit back and just e joy this beautiful place they call paradise.
A very well oiled machine ..
Thanks Hahndorf 😊
A beautiful place for a relaxing break.
This is a great caravan park to stay at while you visit this amazing town.
Incredibly well organized and maintained park. Fabulous campers kitchen and lots of space to play - mini golf was a hit!
La verdad es que el lugar es hermoso. Todas las instalaciones son perfectas  nada que críticar. 10 puntos
Beautiful, very well maintained park, clean, facilities fantastic
Beautiful park, extremely clean and well maintained, great amenities and friendly staff! We loved it :)

These guys do an amazing job! The sites are so nice and private, planted out to give you your own little private space.
Everything is immaculate, it’s a beautiful setting with lots of little touches/ games etc
Even a massive shade over the jumping pillow for the kids which is great!!
Thanks for having us and making it such a nice place to stay!!
Excellent park
Best place ever

We were in a caravan, so I couldn't rate the rooms, but they looked very modern and clean, which is the theme for the whole park, but I have noticed with discovery parks that they try to cram everyone in so they make more money I suppose, and they are constantly gardening with whipper snippers and lawn mowers going non stop, plus the park is on the flight path for Adelaide airport, and they do a lot of conference's and host team bonding seminars, in short, not the quietest park I've been to,being so close to Hahndorf they'll get away with it. I wouldn't go back, to much going on for me, I like the peace and quiet.

This Park is BEAUTIFUL  and VERY CLEAN Staff very friendly
The cabin we stayed at was beautiful  and ever so clean
Would highly recommend this park to anyone the location was superb
We WILL BE BACK
THANKS from the Habels

Very well maintained park on north facing hill with terraced sites. Drive through sites are very good. Not suitable for kids on bikes or people with mobility issues. Wasn’t happy that pool was closed during heatwave and no communication from park management.

Multiple family and friends gathered here. Cabins, motel rooms & caravan park - everyone happy. Clean, plentiful amenities, helpful staff and a safe, kid friendly environment.
I km out of Hahndorf with a small supermarket across from the entrance.

Stayed at Hahndorf discovery for 5 nights.  We were tenting it.  The park itself was amazing, facilities fantastic and the view to die for.  You will definitely get fitter, lots of hills to walk up and down.  We also walked into Hahndorf a few times, probably a 20 minute walk depending on your fitness.  There is a fruit and veg market across the road which has lots of options for meals and is full of local produce.  A great 5 days.

Recently stayed on the 27/02/2024 in a Pet Friendly accommodation. This is one of best pet friendly accommodation we have  ever stayed with. Super clean and very beautiful layout with a small enclosed yard. . Would definitely stay with them again. Amazing location! 5 star

Wir sind "Selbstversorger" - leider gab es in der Unterkunft "nur" Coffee/Tea facilities, einen Toaster und einen Sandwich-Grill - keine Kochplatte. Sehr schöne Lage aber etwas weit ausserhalb von Hahndorf.

We recently stayed at this park and were disappointed. There was three lots of construction going on in the park, along with the pool being closed for close to a week due to "unforeseen maintenance".

The so called pool "maintenance" turned out to be paving work. I don't understand how paving is "unforeseen maintenance", maybe the workmen just turned up and did it for free. Ironically, on one of the days we were there the workmen left before lunchtime because it was too hot for them to work. Why paving work was done in summer rather than winter is beyond me. Also, calling paving work "unforeseen maintenance" is flat out lying to guests and disrespectful.

The pool area (when open) is not family friendly at all, with the shallowest part of the pool being 1.3m deep.

If you like the idea of sweltering in a caravan park, surrounded by chainlink fencing, whilst you are serenaded by the sound of angle grinders cutting pavers then this is the park for you.

The park is quite modern, with good quality amenities that were clean. Not all of the sites are flat, so come prepared with levelling ramps.
Beautiful.
Great Park with all the facilities. Super clean and tidy.
Camped there. Very clean. Picturesque area.

Beautiful place, easy accessible, peaceful, greenery surrounding, children playground ready, swimming pools, quiet place, clean environment, camping space available, restaurant nearby, and grocery store just opposite the main entrance.🫶🏻😊🌻
Toller, großer, parkähnlicher Campingplatz mit toll angelegten Sites, 3 Seen und Pool.
Sehr sauber, schöne Küche, super Lage

We have holidayed at a number of caravan parks and Discovery Parks Hahndorf is with out a doubt the best we have been too. The facilities, amenities overall service is exceptional. Highly recommend to any traveller.  We will be a return customer.

PS thanks for fixing our AC. We turned it on to find it didn't work. I called reception and in the matter of 5 minutes a groundsman was on site who fixed the issue. Just awesome!
Beautiful park. Great location close to the main street and Fruit and Veg market across the road the awesome. Dog friendly 👍
Cabin was large, clean and well equipped. Outside balcony overlooking lake was very scenic and peaceful.

Park presented beautifully with manicured lawns and very well maintained park with beautiful surroundings but the toilets and showers were not kept clean and this was probably due to so many kids around the park. Maybe you should clean the amenities twice a day and not just maintain the grounds.
Also was not a quite park with a 60th party being held in the park and noise from that over 3 nights until very late at night, also children running around yelling at 11pm was not pleasant experience. Would not recommend if after a quite park.
We did speak to a few other caravaners and they were not happy with the noise, blocked road due to party spilling out from caravan site and the noise level late into the night early evening.
What a beautifully maintained park. The grounds are amazing. Great location.  Friendly staff. It really is a great destination.
Our favourite place to stay when we visit the Adelaide hills. Great for families and groups travelling together.
Enjoyed my stay with my family and friends.

Thank you for having us over Christmas time
Service was excellent and everything was clean and mess free
Left a top in the cabin. It wasn't returned.
Quiet & beautiful
干净整洁，配套设施完善，地理位置绝佳
A Beautiful park with amazing facilities! Definitely will be staying again . Reasonably priced powered sites

This place is wonderful. Well maintained grounds, clean and comfortable cabins. They have family activities like mini golf and chess. Waking up to a pond view with ducks is very nice. I will definitely recommend this place highly. Well worth the money.
Great Park, something for all ages in a brilliant Hills town 👍👍
One of the best parks I have ever stayed in. Excellent camp kitchen . Very good powered sites. Many are drive through. The most helpful and pleasant staff you could want.

We stayed here for 9 nights.
Absolute beautiful caravan park.
We had a cabin which was perfect for us neat and tidy.
My sister and husband are travelling around Oz in a Van so we had a site near them.
The grounds are immaculate and very well maintained.
I would highly recommend staying here. 😁

This park is very nicely placed at the end of Hahndorf main street and across from it there is a fresh fruit markets where you can get most essentials.  The park host a swimming pool and the ground is nicely taken care of, with ponds and ducks wondering about.  The rooms are clean and the beds are comfortable.
Fantastic! Great location, Great clean modern facilities. Camp kitchen is excellent. Oh and the local ducks are hilarious, very cheeky but funny. I highly recommend it.
We rate this park in our top 5.The best camp kitchen we have ever come across.Very quiet place with great views.We highly recommend this place.
Well appointed park. Great communal kitchen with awesome views and with an easy walk into Hahndoff
Great place to stay, wonderful Staff

Amazing camp site.

I believe (speaking to other travellers) Discovery/G’day have a reputation for cramming people into parks. While this is a pretty centrally located park that fits a lot of campers in, lovely flora arrangements surround each campsite & make it feel more private. The facilities are modern & very clean.

This was actually one of the first caravan sites we stopped in at while travelling (we’ve now gone via WA through the NT & are in Queensland - so have since had a lot of experience) and it really spoilt us! Nothing has quite compared.

Additionally we had some van problems while here and unfortunately found ourselves broken down outside of our site for a couple of days before we could be towed. The staff were so accommodating and sympathetic (especially given the heatwave). It’s a lovely place and we can’t wait to stop in again.
Very nice, clean and well organised caravan park

We are a couple with 2 young toddlers and a pet dog, booked a 2-bedroom pet-friendly cabin advertised to accommodate four people. To our surprise, we were charged extra for our two children, bringing the total cost to $632 for a 2-night stay. This exceeded our expectations and left us disappointed.

The WiFi in the cabin was another source of frustration. It was too weak for even basic mobile use and couldn't support streaming services on the smart tv like Netflix and YouTube. When we reached out to the reception for assistance, we were informed that the WiFi was only suitable for email, not for streaming.

Furthermore, activities such as marshmallow roasting and giant Jenga, which were listed on the website, were not available during our stay. This was a letdown for our family.

The only highlight of our stay was the jumping pillow. The swimming pool was very small and lacked adequate shading (we also saw ducks swimming inside them, which were kinda cute but..), and the playground was unreasonably small for the number of guests on site.

The rooms however are tidy and clean. And all beds have heated blankets.

In summary, we feel that the price we paid did not align with the facilities and services provided. We have no plans to return, and we cannot recommend Hahndorf Discovery Park to other families with young children.

Perfect spot, ideal to walk into the gorgeous town. Excellent supermarket across the road. Very tidy, clean and green park. Kitchen and laundry has everything. Great pool but very cold. Would definitely stay again.

Great park very clean and well maintained perfect distance from the town with lots to see there. Recommend you try not to get a site close to the camp kitchen. It would have been a perfect score if it wasn't for 3 nights of inconsiderate people in the camp kitchen and needing to get management involved of which the idiots started again 5 mins later. Love the spot love the park but they need to monitor the amenities and enforce the rules. Don't get me wrong l would stay there again but in a different location
Best place ever .

Wow! What an incredible caravan park, the amenities were so clean, the best camp kitchen we’ve seen, and the park itself was so beautiful, and very well maintained.

Dogs are allowed which was a huge plus for us, and although the park was busy, it still felt very private. We loved our stay and will definitely be back.
Great stopover & clean

We stayed in the caravan section on a premium site and found the staff to be very helpful. Site was level drive through with a concrete slab for the awning / annex. Water and gray water connections were conveniently located although power was on the awning side of the site.
We loved our time here and would highly recommend.

Very crowded in the main part so we decided to go over the bridge to the grassed area.
The camp kitchen and eating area  were great.
It was school holidays so they had actives for kids.

We had the most wonderful time at Hahndorf Discovery Park, which was conveniently located close to the main street of Hahndorf.  The cabin was well appointed and very clean and tidy.  The grounds were beautifully maintained and the setting was so peaceful.  We loved the wildlife (rabbits, ducks and birds), and the recreational activities (jumping pillow, mini golf and the pool) were all in great condition and easy to access and enjoy.  The pancake breakfast put on the by the park owners on the Sunday morning was a lovely touch.

This Caravan park is in a beautiful setting on the side of a hill.  The bays are very neat and have privacy hedging between them.  The facilities are excellent.  And I have a tighter butt from walking up the hill to the facilities every day.  Would recommend this park to everyone.   Fees are a tiny bit high but if you don't like the fees don't go on holidays.
Fantastic experience, friendly staff, clean and tidy.
Quiet immaculately modern and clean. As summer comes on need something in between rather than a quilt and sheet.
Nice area, clean room!

Fabulous location & views from the park across the Adelaide Hills are spectacular. The deck outside the camp kitchen has great views & was our favourite spot for our happy hour. Park is very well maintained & amenities were spotless. Saturday afternoon music & drinks van was very popular.
Over inflated prices.
Nice clean and modern, the staff are very helpful..
Great cabins. Although the closest BBQ was approximately 200mtrs from our cabin.
Best park I've been too.
Beautiful grounds, modern/extensive facilities and a great location.  We only stayed 1 night but will stay longer next time
Friendly staff great room awesome experience

Stayed in a powered site with our van and we loved it. Very well maintained facilities, very clean and the staff were all very accommodating.  Thankyou for a great weekend.
Darren

Beautiful place  i haven't stayed myself i met a friend  there that has stayed there a bunch of times . The huts are nice the beds are so  comfortable . From the stunning view and the price you can't go wrong . I'm a suburb man i differently will rent one in the future for a nice get away date night thing
Dog Friendly!!!
Walk into Hahndorf town, so special, facilities for kids to swim and play and so scenic.

It's probably one of the best caravan parks we have been to. Immaculate kitchen, bathrooms, play room, and plenty to do with the littleone. (Also dog friendly)The powered site we had was great as well. Friendly informative staff and it was nice and quiet at night. Highly recommend this place so if you are looking for a caravan park 40 min out of Adelaide make sure you check this place out!
Excellent location off the highway, stylish modern cabin, highly recommend

A bit disappointing to have mud puddles on sites at $62.00 per night. Hard surface alongside caravans would be appreciated in a wet area like Hahndorf. Beautiful site, well maintained. Would be fantastic when dry. Use
Hills , great disabilty, toilets but they are at the top of a hill.
We took our caravan here. One of the most beautiful parkes we have stayed in. Something for everyone. Everything  pristine
When can I move in?
Well appointed resort room, a few minute drive from town.
Located close to town. Great facilities, very clean.

The location, Accommodation and customer service are noteworthy.
We stayed in a single pond side cabin and were impressed with the quality and cleanliness of the room. Traveling with a young baby can be stressful however staff went above and beyond to be accommodating. They even brought a high chair to the room. The cabin felt safe and secure perfect for a little crawler. Definitely somewhere to recommend and I look forward to staying again.

Thank you.
Take a short stroll, and you are in town. The amenities were well kept. The kitchen is BIG and is heated during winter. We only stayed one night, but I highly recommend it.

Stayed here recently in 2023 (below review from 2019). Kids are a bit older now. A god caravan park with loads of good activities to do within and friendly staff. We found some of the site which were deemed suitable for a 17.5 ft caravan were quite difficult to back into but the park itself made up for the difficult in setting up. I would recommend a larger site if not drive thru and your over 18ft.

A well maintained caravan park.
The Good Points: Well maintained sites, very clean and green, a few smallish parks for kids and a large pool (not child friendly for under 7s) and a beautiful restaurant with friendly staff.
The Negative Points: Very hilly campsite not suitable for families with young children. Limited shad from larger trees which are scarce.

A great place to take the family with heaps of towns close by for day trips.

Beautiful campground, probably one of the best on our trip. The facilities are new and very clean, the views are spectacular even on a rainy day and the town of Hahndorf is at walking distance from the camping grounds.
What a fabulous place to stay! We will definitely return

On steep slopes for most caravan sites making access to reversing into sites a little difficult and some sites very soft meaning restricted site use. Overall a great park for facilities except for site access.

Whenever We came to Adelaide, We stayed here.
Family-friendly resort.
The location is absolutely outstanding. The farmers market is just in front of the resort. Restaurants are not far at all.
The staff are  very helpful and friendly.
The room is super clean and modern.
The price is reasonable.
Great place to stay, room was super clean and comfortable would definitely stay again. Reception staff are really lovely
Cabin stay.. was comfy clean and quiet.
Beautiful, the ducks made the morning a fun experience

Amazing resort with immaculate accommodation. The staff were extremely helpful and friendly and really close by to the main street of Hahndorf Village. Highly recommend staying at Discovery Parks Hahndorf 👌
We got a site and facility's were great
Friendly, very clean facilities, easy to get to,  20 minutes from CBD
Great caravan sites. Location is very good. Facilities well maintained and cherry clean. Dump station has hand washing, hand dryer and sanitizer
Arrived about 2pm and booked a site for 3 nights great park. Close to everything and great amenities!! 👍
Didn't stay here, but came to play mini golf. Great little course.
Great place to stay, amenities top notch

Relaxing, accommodating, friendly.
Perfect getaway location for our family in our Jayco Pop Up. Sizeable powered sites.
Love the open fire pit, which was very popular.
Great caravan park on the edge of Hahndorf. Good sized spots for vans. Beautiful clean amenities.

Loved the stay, view, amenities, entertainment, rooms, and camp sites.

We were there for a business conference which was held in the convention centre.

Overall, it is a lovely place to be with family, right next to handhorf, wineries, restaurants, cafes, and pubs.

Fabulous cabin,  with 2 queen size beds,  great bathroom and a full kitchen.   We had lovely views over the lake.
Sitting outside was fine as we were sheltered from the wind,  but did need blankets as there is no outdoor heating.
Lots of amenities too, such as games room,  bouncing pillow and a pool for the warmer months.
Outstanding facilities.VERY clean . Helpful staff

Nice clean place with great views.  Many things to do for young kids, games room, bouncing pillow & plenty of roadways for their bikes.  Some drive-through sites for vans, great fire pit.  Short walk to the local distillery & a 2 minute drive into town.
Great location ....

Incredible!  Super clean, fabulous resort, large but very private ambiance in beautiful surroundings! Amenities are immaculately clean with an added bonus is it's located opposite a fresh food market opened 7 days a week.
Nice place great views
Lovely place, top service.  Attended a book club retreat and the food and service was amazing.  Will attend park again.
Everything great; shame about the weather. Excellent market across the road and loads to see and taste in Hahndorf.
